atomic_facts.fact: The person is using a knife to slice a piece of raw meat.
The meat is resting on a white cutting board.
The person's left hand is holding the meat steady while the right hand operates the knife.
The text 'OurVideoCookbook' is visible in the top right corner.

spatial: The person is positioned above the white cutting board. The raw meat is on top of the cutting board, held by the person's left hand. The knife is in the person's right hand, positioned to the left of the meat and moving downwards into it. The text overlay is in the top right corner of the frame, above the person's arm.
state_changes: Action change: slicing raw meat (elongated shape).
